description:
WrenchLog is the private, ad-free vehicle maintenance tracker that keeps your cars healthy and your wallet informed.

No account. No ads. No tracking. Your data stays on your device — period.

▸ VIN DECODER
Enter your 17-digit VIN and WrenchLog auto-fills make, model, and year from the official NHTSA database. No manual entry needed.

▸ SAFETY RECALL ALERTS
WrenchLog checks your vehicle against the NHTSA recall database and alerts you to any open safety recalls. Stay safe without lifting a finger.

▸ TRACK EVERY SERVICE
Log oil changes, tire rotations, brake work, battery replacements, and 20+ preset service types across 6 categories. Record date, mileage, cost, notes, and attach receipt photos to every entry.

▸ FUEL TRACKING & EFFICIENCY
Log every fill-up with fuel type, volume, cost, and station name. WrenchLog calculates your MPG (or L/100km), cost per mile, and tracks efficiency trends over time with interactive charts. Supports Regular, Mid-Grade, Premium, Diesel, E85, and Electric vehicles.

▸ SMART REMINDERS
Never miss another oil change. WrenchLog sends intelligent reminders based on time intervals, mileage thresholds, and your actual driving pace. Each reminder learns how fast you drive and notifies you at the right moment — not too early, not too late.

▸ VEHICLE HEALTH SCORE
See your car's maintenance health at a glance with a 0–100 score. The score weighs critical services (engine, brakes) heavier and updates in real time as you complete services or fall behind.

▸ COST ANALYTICS (Pro)
Donut charts for service-vs-fuel split, category breakdowns, monthly spending trends, yearly cost of ownership, and per-mile cost tracking. Know exactly where your money goes.

▸ PDF EXPORT (Pro)
Generate clean, professional service history reports in PDF format. Perfect for selling your car, insurance claims, or sharing with your mechanic.

▸ CSV EXPORT & IMPORT
Export all your data as CSV files for backup or analysis in a spreadsheet. Import service records from CSV to migrate from other apps or paper logs.

▸ MULTI-VEHICLE GARAGE (Pro)
Manage your entire fleet — cars, trucks, motorcycles, anything with wheels. Each vehicle gets its own dashboard, timeline, health score, and reminders. Compare costs across vehicles with side-by-side charts.

▸ MAINTENANCE TIMELINE
See every service and fill-up on a chronological timeline, grouped by month. A visual history of your car's entire life.

▸ MAINTENANCE CHECKLIST
Create custom to-do lists for each vehicle. Pre-loaded suggestions for common checks like tire pressure, oil level, and brake inspection.

▸ SEASONAL TIPS
Maintenance suggestions based on the current season — winterize in December, check A/C before summer.

▸ MILESTONE BADGES
Earn badges as you build your history — First Service, Dedicated, Road Warrior, Fleet Owner, and more.

▸ CUSTOMIZABLE UNITS
Miles or kilometers. Gallons or liters. MPG or L/100km. WrenchLog speaks your language.

▸ FIVE COLOR THEMES
Default Amber, Ocean Blue, Dark Mono, Forest Green, or Sunset Rose. Pick what looks right to you.

▸ PRIVACY FIRST
WrenchLog collects zero personal data. No account signup. No analytics SDKs. No third-party tracking. No ads — ever. Your vehicle data never leaves your device. We don't sell your information to data brokers, insurance companies, or anyone else.

▸ BUILT FOR CAR PEOPLE
Weekend wrenchers, families with multiple cars, or sellers needing proof of maintenance — WrenchLog gives you a complete ownership record without the bloat.

FREE: 2 vehicles, service logging, fuel tracking, smart reminders, VIN decoder, recall alerts, health score, checklist, timeline, milestone badges.
PRO: Unlimited vehicles, receipt photos, PDF reports, cost analytics, CSV export, spending projections, all color themes.

Questions? theknack2020@gmail.com
Privacy Policy: https://theknack2020-sketch.github.io/wrenchlog/privacy/
Terms of Use: https://theknack2020-sketch.github.io/wrenchlog/terms/
whatsNew:
v1.2.0 — A major quality update. Every screen polished, paywall reimagined, and under-the-hood reliability improved.

Beautiful New Design
Every screen now uses premium haptics, springy animations, and layered depth. Sell a vehicle, edit a service, or review reminders — all redesigned from scratch with the same world-class finish.

Prominent Health Score
Your car's 0-100 health score now lives front and center on the detail view, with a full color-coded ring. Know at a glance whether your ride is on track or needs attention.

Smarter Empty States
Upcoming services, checklists, and timelines now use polished empty-state screens so you always know what to do next.

Better Paywall Experience
The Pro upgrade presents as a full-screen experience — no accidental swipe dismisses. Cleaner comparison tables, tappable "Restore Purchases" that actually works, and Terms + Privacy always one tap away.

2 Free Vehicles
We've doubled the free tier. Track two vehicles without going Pro. Gate, comparison table, and upgrade prompts all say the same thing.

Helpful Tips
Discover features as you use the app. Built on Apple TipKit so tips only appear when you're ready for them.

Full Dynamic Type
Every hardcoded font size has been replaced with Dynamic Type. Crank up your accessibility text — the whole app scales with you.

Crash Protection
24 unsafe Calendar paths hardened. Zero force-unwraps in production code. If anything ever fails, the app falls back gracefully instead of crashing.

Faster, Cleaner Release
Migrated deprecated colors to the new design system. Currency values now display with thousand separators. Onboarding skips correctly for returning users. Dozens of small polish fixes.

No ads. No tracking. Your maintenance data stays on your device and in iCloud.
promotionalText: Track every oil change, fill-up, and repair. Smart reminders learn your driving pace. VIN decoder and recall alerts built in. No ads — your data stays private.
